content: Remote OK Provider Success Manager Regard As a Provider Success Manager at Regard, you will own the education process and provider relationship throughout the contract period for assigned client organizations. You will collaborate closely with the Customer Experience team and will be responsible for scheduling education, shadow, and debrief sessions; building relationships with individual clinicians; identifying and escalating barriers to adoption; and recommending opportunities to improve onboarding, clinician communication, and user feedback processes. In addition to client-facing responsibilities, this role actively contributes to improving how the Provider Success team operates by identifying inefficiencies, piloting new approaches, and owning or supporting internal process improvement initiatives that scale education quality and clinician adoption. This role will report to the Director of Provider Success and will work closely with members of the Customer Experience, Sales, Marketing, Product, and Engineering teams to manager, director, education 2026-04-11T14:00:09+00:00 1131084 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-provider-success-manager-regard-1131084 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Senior IAM Engineer IonQ <div><p><strong>About IonQ:&nbsp;</strong><strong><br></strong></p><p><u><a href="https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&amp;url=https%3A%2F%2Fionq.com%2F&amp;esheet=54451094&amp;newsitemid=20260316477473&amp;lan=en-US&amp;anchor=IonQ%2C+Inc&amp;index=7&amp;md5=0818ffbedc6dbad8c4d1611ac94c2a0f" target="_blank">IonQ, Inc</a></u>. IonQ芒聙聶s newest generation of quantum computers, the IonQ Tempo, is the latest in a line of cutting-edge systems that have been helping customers and partners including <u><a href="https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&amp;url=https%3A%2F%2Fionq.com%2Fnews%2Fionq-speeds-quantum-accelerated-drug-development-application-with&amp;esheet=54451094&amp;newsitemid=20260316477473&amp;lan=en-US&amp;anchor=Amazon+Web+Services%2C&amp;index=8&amp;md5=a7f94ee9b71a392dca3cd6c413722e51" target="_blank">Amazon Web Services, </a></u><u><a href="https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&amp;url=https%3A%2F%2Fionq.com%2Fnews%2Fionq-speeds-quantum-accelerated-drug-development-application-with&amp;esheet=54451094&amp;newsitemid=20260316477473&amp;lan=en-US&amp;anchor=and&amp;index=9&amp;md5=2bed627b388878763f41ffe0e4edb16c" target="_blank">and </a></u><u><a href="https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&amp;url=https%3A%2F%2Fionq.com%2Fnews%2Fionq-speeds-quantum-accelerated-drug-development-application-with&amp;esheet=54451094&amp;newsitemid=20260316477473&amp;lan=en-US&amp;anchor=AstraZeneca&amp;index=10&amp;md5=757c1f2c2ec94cf3982700106122164f" target="_blank">AstraZeneca</a></u> achieve 20x performance results and accelerate innovation in drug discovery</p></div> web, senior, engineer Bothell, Washington, United States; Boulder, Colorado, United States; College Park, Maryland, United States; Remote, US 2026-04-11T06:01:12+00:00 1131083 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-senior-iam-engineer-ionq-1131083 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Machine Learning Engineer Radformation <h3 data-section-id="1p01kxj" data-start="213" data-end="237">About Radformation</h3><p data-start="238" data-end="538">Radformation is transforming the way cancer clinics deliver care. Our innovative software automates and standardizes radiation oncology workflows, enabling clinicians to plan and deliver treatments faster, safer, and more consistently, so patients everywhere can receive the same high-quality care.</p><p>Our software focuses on three key areas:</p><ul><li>Time savings through automation.</li><li>Error reduction through automated systems.</li><li>Increased quality care through advanced algorithms and workflows.</li></ul><p data-start="732" data-end="1071">We are a fully remote, mission-driven team united by a shared goal: to reduce cancer芒聙聶s global impact and help save more of the 10 million lives it claims each year. Every line of code, every product release, and every conversation with our customers brings us closer to ensuring no patient芒聙聶s treatment quality depends on where they live.</p><h3 data-section-id="1qmwure" data-start="1073" data-end="1100">Why This Role Matters</h3><p data-start="1101" data-end="1296">In this role you will help advance Radformation芒聙聶s AI-driven radiotherapy products by building and improving machine learning models that directly impact clinical workflows and patient outcomes.</p><p data-start="1298" data-end="1492">You will work closely with AI, cloud, research, and product teams to develop scalable data pipelines, improve model performance, and support regulatory submissions for medical device software.</p><h3 data-section-id="3j62qx" data-start="1494" data-end="1572">Responsibilities Include:</h3><ul><li data-start="1573" data-end="2183">Design, build, and maintain robust ETL pipelines to support AI model development and deployment.</li><li data-start="1573" data-end="2183">Develop, train, and optimize machine learning models used in radiotherapy software.</li><li data-start="1573" data-end="2183">Collaborate with product and research teams to bring new AI-driven features and algorithms into production.</li><li data-start="1573" data-end="2183">Support FDA submissions by contributing to documentation, validation, and regulatory processes.</li><li data-start="1573" data-end="2183">Participate in design reviews, risk analyses, and cross-functional discussions to ensure safe and effective products.</li><li data-start="1573" data-end="2183">Mentor junior engineers and data scientists and contribute to a collaborative team environment.</li></ul><h3 data-section-id="1rz4pe3" data-start="2185" data-end="2211">Required Experience:</h3><ul><li data-start="2212" data-end="2657">MS in Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field with 3+ years of experience.</li><li data-start="2212" data-end="2657">Expert-level proficiency in Python.</li><li data-start="2212" data-end="2657">Hands-on experience building, training, and tuning machine learning models.</li><li data-start="2212" data-end="2657">Strong experience with PyTorch and/or TensorFlow.</li><li data-start="2212" data-end="2657">Experience developing convolutional neural networks, including U-Net architectures.</li><li data-start="2212" data-end="2657">Experience using Git and modern code repositories (GitHub, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, etc.).</li></ul><h3
